files.description: MemoryVault Claude Code instructions — identity, infodump workflow, file rules
MemoryVault index of all sessions and key topics

Mitch's preferences — sleep, exercise, cooking, caffeine, dislikes, love languages, thinking style, tech tools
Mitch's decision history and active projects
Raw infodump — Mitch's full knowledge file as of April 13, 2026
Raw infodump — full identity file including languages, work philosophy, social network, values, media
Books Mitch has read and key intellectual figures
Films, YouTube channels, and TED talks

Taste Vault — relational graph of nodes and edges

Ingestion script — parses Claude.ai data export (zip or JSON) and writes raw dumps to conversations/raw/YYYY/MM/<uuid>.json plus a flat INDEX.md
Raw JSON dumps of every Claude.ai conversation, organized by year/month
Flat searchable index of all ingested conversations — generated by ingest_claude_export.py
